recovery_policy: Rerun the identical sealed-context arm. Successful responses are reused from the immutable gateway cache; only uncached validation failures are requested again. The denominator remains 160.
interpretation: All requests reached the gateway, but nine responses failed the shared output schema after retries. A direct replay of the first failed question produced schema-valid JSON, so this is treated as stochastic format non-compliance and recovered without changing prompts, contexts, model, metrics, or question membership.
